## `avg` [promql-fn-avg]

{applies_to}`stack: preview 9.4.0` {applies_to}`serverless: preview`

Calculates the average of the values across the input vector.

Returns `instant_vector`.

### Parameters

`v` (`instant_vector`)
:   Instant vector input.

### Example

```
avg(http_requests_total)
```
